Hi there,

Glad you're here. You're about ninety seconds from your first digest \u2014 here's the quickest path to it.

", "align": "left", "font_family": "Inter", "font_size": "16px", "font_weight": "400", "text_color": "#6A7080", "line_height": "1.7", "background_color": "#ffffff", "padding_top": 12, "padding_bottom": 12, "padding_left": 44, "padding_right": 44}}, {"type": "text", "props": {"html_content": "

  1. Connect your tools \u2014 most teams start with GitHub and Slack.
  2. Invite a teammate or two, so the digest has a room to land in.
  3. Set your digest time and let Relay handle the rest.

name: Newsletter
title: Newsletter
blocks_json:
[{"type": "text", "props": {"html_content": "

The Quill

", "align": "center", "font_family": "Georgia", "font_size": "17px", "font_weight": "700", "text_color": "#8B2020", "background_color": "#f7f2ed", "padding_top": 30, "padding_bottom": 8, "padding_left": 44, "padding_right": 44}}, {"type": "text", "props": {"html_content": "

What great designers do differently

", "align": "center", "font_family": "Georgia", "font_size": "26px", "font_weight": "700", "text_color": "#1a1210", "line_height": "1.25", "background_color": "#f7f2ed", "padding_top": 32, "padding_bottom": 8, "padding_left": 44, "padding_right": 44}}, {"type": "text", "props": {"html_content": "

The habits that separate craft from coincidence.

", "align": "center", "font_family": "Georgia", "font_size": "17px", "font_weight": "400", "text_color": "#5a4e47", "line_height": "1.6", "background_color": "#f7f2ed", "padding_top": 4, "padding_bottom": 40, "padding_left": 44, "padding_right": 44}}, {"type": "text", "props": {"html_content": "

Welcome back. This month we went deep on craft \u2014 what it actually takes to make something feel inevitable. Two stories worth your morning.

", "align": "left", "font_family": "Georgia", "font_size": "16px", "font_weight": "400", "text_color": "#5a4e47", "line_height": "1.7", "background_color": "#ffffff", "padding_top": 24, "padding_bottom": 12, "padding_left": 44, "padding_right": 44}}, {"type": "divider", "props": {"border_color": "#e5ddd6", "width": "100%", "padding_top": 20, "padding_bottom": 4, "background_color": "#ffffff", "padding_left": 44, "padding_right": 44}}, {"type": "section_label", "props": {"label": "This month's highlights", "align": "left", "font_family": "Georgia", "text_color": "#5a4e47", "line_color": "#e5ddd6", "background_color": "#ffffff", "padding_top": 16, "padding_bottom": 6, "padding_left": 44, "padding_right": 44}}, {"type": "image_text", "props": {"image_url": "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1455390582262-044cdead277a?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=480&h=320", "text": "Designers who ship things people love almost always describe the same turning point: the moment they stopped fighting the limits and started designing inside them.", "heading": "On constraints and the brief", "heading_color": "#1a1210", "image_position": "right", "image_width": "180px", "font_family": "Georgia", "background_color": "#ffffff", "padding_top": 16, "padding_bottom": 16, "padding_left": 44, "padding_right": 44}}, {"type": "divider", "props": {"border_color": "#e5ddd6", "width": "100%", "padding_top": 24, "padding_bottom": 4, "background_color": "#ffffff", "padding_left": 44, "padding_right": 44}}, {"type": "image_text", "props": {"image_url": "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1481627834876-b7833e8f5570?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=480&h=320", "text": "The designers we spoke to disagree with the 'nobody reads' headline. The ones who read widely \u2014 not just design books \u2014 make connections that specialists miss. It shows in the work.", "heading": "The case for reading outside your field", "heading_color": "#1a1210", "image_position": "left", "image_width": "180px", "font_family": "Georgia", "background_color": "#ffffff", "padding_top": 16, "padding_bottom": 16, "padding_left": 44, "padding_right": 44}}, {"type": "quote", "props": {"quote": "The Quill is the only newsletter I open the morning it arrives. It treats design as a practice, not a toolset.", "author": "Ananya Krishnan", "role": "Senior Product Designer, Cartograph", "style": "left-border", "font_family": "Georgia", "quote_color": "#1a1210", "author_color": "#5a4e47", "border_color": "#8B2020", "background_color": "#f7f2ed", "padding_top": 36, "padding_bottom": 36, "padding_left": 44, "padding_right": 44}}, {"type": "text", "props": {"html_content": "

There's a lot more in this issue \u2014 interviews, links worth saving, and one tool we've been quietly recommending to everyone we know.

", "align": "center", "font_family": "Georgia", "font_size": "16px", "font_weight": "400", "text_color": "#5a4e47", "line_height": "1.7", "background_color": "#f7f2ed", "padding_top": 8, "padding_bottom": 4, "padding_left": 44, "padding_right": 44}}, {"type": "button", "props": {"label": "Read all stories \u2192", "url": "#", "color": "#8B2020", "text_color": "#ffffff", "background_color": "#f7f2ed", "font_family": "Georgia", "font_size": "15px", "button_padding": "normal", "border_radius": "999px", "align": "center", "padding_top": 16, "padding_bottom": 40}}, {"type": "social", "props": {"instagram_url": "https://instagram.com", "x_url": "https://x.com", "website_url": "https://example.com", "color": "#b8bec7", "align": "center", "icon_size": 16, "background_color": "#f7f2ed", "padding_top": 24, "padding_bottom": 8}}, {"type": "footer", "props": {"text": "You're receiving The Quill because you subscribed at thequill.co.
